abstracts.abstract:
SB 1790 - This act effectively reduces the tax rate paid by all existing property owners when a data center is built by creating a mandatory rate reduction mechanism.
JOSH NORBERG

bill.title:
SB 1790 - This act effectively reduces the tax rate paid by all existing property owners when a data center is built by creating a mandatory rate reduction mechanism.
JOSH NORBERG

action.description: Second Read and Referred S Select Committee on Property Taxes and the State Tax Commission Committee
